activities_projects.title: Fraction to Percentage Conversion
activities_projects.objective: Understand how fractions can be expressed as percentages
steps: Verify by multiplying the fraction by 100
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand conversion of fractions into percentages

activities_projects.title: Percentage Around Us
activities_projects.objective: Identify real life uses of percentages
steps: Collect five real-life examples where percentages are used
Write the context of each percentage
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect mathematics with real-life situations

activities_projects.title: Percentage of Quantity
activities_projects.objective: Calculate percentage of a given number
steps: Explain how each result was obtained
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to calculate percentages mentally and by formula

activities_projects.title: Bar Model Representation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop visual understanding of percentages

activities_projects.title: Percentage Comparison
steps: Take two exam scores with different totals
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to compare proportions using percentages

activities_projects.title: Profit and Loss Activity
steps: Assume cost price of an item
Set a selling price higher than cost price

activities_projects.title: Discount Calculation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand discounts and final prices

activities_projects.title: Ratio to Percentage
steps: Convert each ratio into a fraction
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect ratio, fraction, and percentage concepts

activities_projects.title: Simple Interest Exploration
steps: Take interest rate of 10% per year
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand basic concept of interest
